title: Regenerate 8 Publication Figures with Updated Fig 5 (Classifier Comparison) and Fig 8 (Prospective Protocol)
summary: Demonstrates regeneration of 8 NeurIPS publication-quality figures from CSD (Critical Slowing Down) experiments on LLM capability boundaries. Combines data from 5 experiment dependencies (arithmetic CSD, graph coloring CSD, classifier comparison, temperature manipulation, model fitting) into a unified pipeline that generates figures with NeurIPS dimension compliance. Evaluates each figure for file size, dimension compliance, and data points plotted. Includes prospective protocol computation (any-1, CUSUM, d*-free Logistic Regression) and a classifier comparison (CSD vs SPUQ). Uses mini_demo_data.json (64KB) containing curated preview data from all 5 dependencies. Runs in ~5 seconds producing 8 PNG+PDF figure pairs.
